message.content:
Navigate through these pages on http://localhost:5173 and take screenshots of each. The app is already logged in. Click each sidebar button in order and take a screenshot:
1. "Annuaire Indexé" 
2. "GTO Gas (Crédits)"
3. "Base Clients"
4. "Ordres de Mission"
5. "Alertes AEO"
6. "Compte & Plan"
7. "Affiliation"

For each page, click the sidebar button using JavaScript:
```
(function() { const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button'); const btn = Array.from(buttons).find(b => b.textContent.trim() === 'PAGE_NAME'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'clicked'; } return 'not found'; })();
```

Then take a screenshot. Report which pages work and which have issues.

content.text: I'll navigate through each page in the sidebar, clicking the buttons and taking screenshots. Let me start by navigating to the app.
The app is showing the landing page, not a logged-in state. I see a "Connexion" button. Let me click it to log in first.
That opened a language dropdown. Let me close it and click the "Connexion" button specifically.

input.script: (function() { const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button'); const btn = Array.from(buttons).find(b => b.textContent.trim() === 'Connexion'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'clicked'; } return 'not found'; })()

content.text: I see the login page. The app is not logged in yet. Let me try to log in. I need to check if there are any credentials available, or try to navigate directly to the dashboard. Let me first check the source code for any test credentials.

content.text:
All 7 pages have been navigated and screenshotted. Here is the full report:

---

## Results Summary: All 7 Pages Working

### Page 1: "Annuaire Indexe" -- WORKS
- Displays the "Annuaire Knowledge Graph" page
- Shows a directory of AEO-certified entities (Stripe score 98, Linear score 94, etc.)
- Includes category filters (All, Fintech, SaaS B2B, Search API, Banque, Sante, Assurance)
- Search bar and "Rejoindre l'Index" button present
- Shows a "Limite atteinte" card indicating the Starter plan allows only 1 project

### Page 2: "GTO Gas (Credits)" -- WORKS
- Displays the "GTO Gas Station" recharge page
- Shows current balance: 0 Gas
- Three credit packs displayed: Le Jerrican (50 Gas, 15 EUR), La Pompe (200 Gas, 49 EUR, marked "MEILLEURE OFFRE"), La Citerne (1000 Gas, 199 EUR)
- Each pack lists features and pricing (Prix HT)

### Page 3: "Base Clients" -- WORKS
- Displays a full client management page
- Summary cards: MRR Total 923 EUR, 7 Clients Actifs, 6 Via Missions, 9 Total Clients
- Table with columns: Entreprise, Contact, Plan, Statut, Source, Score AEO, Revenus
- Clients listed include TechFlow Solutions, GreenGarden Bio, OmniMedia Group, TechVision SAS
- Filtering by source (Toutes sources, Clients directs, Via Ordres de Mission) and status (Tous, Actifs, En attente, Inactifs)
- Export CSV and Nouveau Client buttons present

### Page 4: "Ordres de Mission" -- WORKS
- Displays mission orders management page
- Summary cards: 2 Nouvelles, 3 En Traitement, 1 Terminee, 10,100.00 EUR Escrow Bloque
- Filter tabs: Tous (7), Nouveaux (2), Acceptes (1), En cours (1), Validation (1), Termines (1), Refuses (1)
- Mission cards showing WellnessZone (En cours, 3500 EUR, 50%), StartupLab (Nouveau, 7500 EUR), TechVision SAS (Nouveau, 2500 EUR)

### Page 5: "Alertes AEO" -- WORKS
- Displays AEO alerts monitoring page with "8 actives" badge
- Summary: 2 Alertes Critiques, 3 Alertes Warning, 3 Alertes Info, 2 Resolues ce mois
- Alert list with details (e.g., "Score AEO en chute libre -23 pts", "Citation IA perdue sur ChatGPT")
- Right panel: "Configuration des alertes" with toggles for Score AEO en baisse, Nouveau bot detecte, Citation IA perdue, Changement robots.txt, Erreur Schema.org

### Page 6: "Compte & Plan" -- WORKS
- Displays account management page with three tabs: Profil, Abonnement & Projets, Facturation
- Profile card showing demo user (demo@leadradar.io) on "Le Jerrican" plan
- GTO Gas balance: 0 (~0 audits restants)
- API keys section with public key (cb_pk_live_user_2gm...)
- Personal information form (Nom Complet, Email, Workspace/Entreprise)
- Deconnexion button in top-right

### Page 7: "Affiliation" -- WORKS
- Displays the "Programme Partenaire" affiliate page
- Referral link: https://citedby.ai?ref=demo with copy button
- Summary cards: 1450.50 EUR Commissions Totales (+12% ce mois-ci), 320.00 EUR En Attente, 18 Filleuls Actifs (sur 1240 clics uniques), 1.45% Taux de Conversion
- Three tabs: Vue d'ensemble, Mes Filleuls, Paiements
- Performance (30 jours) chart area
- Right sidebar: Ressources Marketing kit and Niveaux de commission (Bronze 20%)

---

**Conclusion: All 7 sidebar pages load correctly and display their full content without any errors or issues.**
